hooks.command: diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/requirements.txt" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/requirements.txt" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/requirements.txt" . && pip install -r requirements.txt -t "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/python_modules" --quiet) || rm -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/requirements.txt"
